sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102625" key="tau)to/nomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταὐτό-νομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n102625.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">following the same rule</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Par.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
